title: Nina's Little Garden
summary: Девочка Нина сажает маленький сад, ухаживает за ним весь год и делится овощами и цветами с соседями.
character: Nina is a small girl with two brown braids, a yellow dress with green dots, rubber boots, and a signature wide straw hat.
style: bright warm watercolor children's picture-book illustration, rounded shapes, fresh garden colours

pages.en: It was spring. Nina got a small bag of seeds from her grandma. She wanted to grow her own little garden.
pages.ru: Была весна. Нина получила от бабушки маленький пакетик семян. Она хотела вырастить свой собственный маленький сад.
pages.scene: Nina, a small girl with two brown braids, a yellow dress with green dots, rubber boots and a wide straw hat, stands in a sunny spring garden holding a small paper bag of seeds, with green grass and a wooden fence behind her.

pages.en: Nina dug small holes in the soft brown soil. She planted the seeds one by one. "Grow well, little seeds," she said.
pages.ru: Нина выкопала маленькие ямки в мягкой коричневой земле. Она посадила семена одно за другим. «Растите хорошо, семечки», — сказала она.
pages.scene: Nina in her straw hat, yellow dress with green dots and rubber boots kneels on the spring soil with a small trowel, gently placing seeds into little holes in a fresh garden bed.

pages.en: Every morning Nina filled her green can with water. She watered the garden and waited. The sun was warm and bright.
pages.ru: Каждое утро Нина наполняла свою зелёную лейку водой. Она поливала сад и ждала. Солнце было тёплым и ярким.
pages.scene: Nina, a small girl with two brown braids and a wide straw hat in a yellow dress with green dots, pours water from a green watering can onto the brown garden bed under a big warm spring sun.

pages.en: After many days, the first green sprouts came up. Nina was very happy. "Look! My garden is growing!" she said.
pages.ru: Через много дней показались первые зелёные ростки. Нина была очень счастлива. «Смотрите! Мой сад растёт!» — сказала она.
pages.scene: Nina in her straw hat and yellow dress with green dots claps her hands with joy in the spring garden, looking at tiny green sprouts pushing up from the soil in neat little rows.

pages.en: Then trouble came. Tall weeds grew between the plants, and heavy rain fell for two days. Nina felt worried about her garden.
pages.ru: Потом пришла беда. Между растениями выросли высокие сорняки, и два дня шёл сильный дождь. Нина переживала за свой сад.
pages.scene: Nina, a small girl with two brown braids in a wide straw hat, yellow dress and rubber boots, stands under grey rainy clouds holding a small umbrella, looking worried at her muddy garden full of tall weeds.

pages.en: Nina did not give up. She pulled out the weeds and put little sticks by the plants. Soon the sun came back.
pages.ru: Нина не сдалась. Она вырвала сорняки и поставила рядом с растениями палочки. Скоро вернулось солнце.
pages.scene: Nina in her straw hat, yellow dress with green dots and rubber boots kneels in the garden, pulling up weeds and pushing small wooden sticks next to the young plants as the sun returns through soft clouds.

pages.en: It was summer now. The plants were big and strong. Red tomatoes, orange carrots, and bright flowers were everywhere.
pages.ru: Теперь было лето. Растения стали большими и крепкими. Повсюду были красные помидоры, оранжевая морковь и яркие цветы.
pages.scene: Nina, a small girl with two brown braids and a wide straw hat in a yellow dress, stands proudly in a lush summer garden full of red tomatoes, orange carrots and colourful sunflowers and daisies under a bright blue sky.

pages.en: When autumn came, it was time for the big harvest. Nina picked the vegetables and flowers. Her basket was soon full.
pages.ru: Когда пришла осень, настало время большого урожая. Нина собрала овощи и цветы. Её корзина скоро наполнилась.
pages.scene: Nina in her straw hat and yellow dress with green dots fills a large wicker basket with ripe tomatoes, carrots and bright flowers in an autumn garden with golden and orange leaves on the ground.

pages.en: Nina wanted to share her garden. She gave fresh vegetables and flowers to her neighbours. Everyone smiled and said thank you.
pages.ru: Нина захотела поделиться своим садом. Она раздала свежие овощи и цветы соседям. Все улыбались и говорили спасибо.
pages.scene: Nina, a small girl with two brown braids in a wide straw hat and yellow dress, hands tomatoes and a bunch of flowers to her smiling neighbours by the wooden fence, with autumn trees and her garden behind them.

pages.en: That evening Nina sat in her garden and felt proud. Her little garden made many people happy. "I will plant again next spring," she said.
pages.ru: В тот вечер Нина сидела в своём саду и гордилась собой. Её маленький сад сделал многих людей счастливыми. «Весной я снова посажу сад», — сказала она.
pages.scene: Nina in her straw hat, yellow dress with green dots and rubber boots sits happily on a small bench in her autumn garden at sunset, holding a single flower and smiling, with empty garden beds and warm orange sky behind her.
